overview: A single-tenant restaurant reservation management app with invite-based staff access, per-day open hours settings, and a time-aware reservation list UI that respects late-night service windows.
features: Invite-only staff access with pending/accepted/deactivated user states
First sign-up becomes admin instantly; further sign-ups blocked
Admin user management: create users, copy invite links, deactivate accounts
Admin open hours settings per day of week
Time-aware reservation list: respects late-night closing windows across midnight
Date navigation with prev/next open day buttons
Reservation CRUD: add, edit, delete with form validation
Summary bar showing total reservations and guest count per day
